phases.label: Gather Preferences
phases.description: Collect travel requirements from the user (destination, dates, budget, group info, interests, etc.)

phases.label: Shortlist Destinations
phases.description: Research and shortlist 8-10 destinations matching the user's preferences

phases.label: Select Destinations
phases.description: Present the shortlisted destinations and let the user choose which ones to explore

phases.label: Research Experiences
phases.description: Find activities and experiences at the selected destinations that match preferences

phases.label: Plan Itinerary
phases.description: Build a day-by-day itinerary slotting places and activities

phases.label: Research Accommodation & Flights
phases.description: Research places to stay and flight options for the trip

phases.label: Final Plan
phases.description: Present the complete, detailed travel plan with all details

destination_research.reason: Primary historical hub and gateway to the islands.
destination_research.description: The heart of ancient Greece, featuring the Acropolis and Temple of Olympian Zeus. Essential for mythology.

destination_research.reason: Best mix of kid-friendly beaches and accessible ruins.
destination_research.description: Perfect family island with shallow sandy beaches and the Portara (Temple of Apollo gate).
Home of the Minotaur's Labyrinth (Knossos) and pink sand beaches like Elafonisi.
Charming seaside base for visiting Mycenae and the Ancient Theater of Epidaurus.
The 'Navel of the World' and home to the famous Oracle.
destination_research.reason: Key mythological site with stunning scenery.

destination_research.description: Medieval history mixed with ancient ruins and great resort beaches.

destination_research.reason: Iconic scenery and unique archaeological history.
destination_research.description: The Atlantis myth and the Akrotiri archaeological site.

destination_research.reason: Lush nature and distinct architectural history.
destination_research.description: Venetian history and the Achilleion Palace (themed around Achilles).
Birthplace of Apollo and Artemis; an island-sized museum.
The mythical home of the Centaurs with beautiful beaches and forests.
